comparison.interpretation: E2_matched < E1 by more than 1 pp, suggesting the E1 gain is not explained by parameter count alone.

claim_impact.C001: SUPPORTED WITH CAVEAT - parameter-count confound is reduced
claim_impact.C002: NOT CONFIRMED - explicit viewpoint mechanism remains unsupported
claim_impact.A8_attack: PARTIALLY ADDRESSED - gain is not explained by capacity alone
